    ],

  "concepts": [
    {"id": "c_ai", "name": "Artificial intelligence", "aliases": ["AI"], "description": "The general technology whose risks and benefits governments must navigate and harness across society and the economy.", "grounding_span": "artificial intelligence (AI)", "location": "intro paragraphs"},
    {"id": "c_readiness", "name": "AI readiness", "aliases": ["readiness for responsible AI integration"], "description": "A country's preparedness to responsibly integrate AI, assessed and enhanced through the described tools.", "grounding_span": "their readiness for responsible AI integration", "location": "intro paragraphs"},
    {"id": "c_responsible_ai", "name": "Responsible AI integration", "aliases": [], "description": "Integrating AI in a manner that is safe, responsible, beneficial and equitable across all sectors of society.", "grounding_span": "readiness for responsible AI integration", "location": "intro paragraphs"},
    {"id": "c_sdg", "name": "Sustainable Development Goals", "aliases": ["SDGs"], "description": "Global development goals the UN aims to help countries achieve by leveraging AI safely and responsibly.", "grounding_span": "Sustainable Development Goals", "location": "intro paragraphs"},
    {"id": "c_public_service", "name": "Public service delivery", "aliases": [], "description": "The delivery of government services, which AI is meant to help transform.", "grounding_span": "transform public service delivery", "location": "AILA section"},
    {"id": "c_gov_user", "name": "Government as a User", "aliases": [], "description": "An AILA focus area treating government as a user of AI technologies.", "grounding_span": "Government as a User", "location": "AILA section"},
    {"id": "c_gov_enabler", "name": "Government as an Enabler", "aliases": [], "description": "An AILA focus area treating government as an enabler of AI in the broader economy.", "grounding_span": "Government as an Enabler", "location": "AILA section"},
    {"id": "c_ethical_ai", "name": "Ethical AI", "aliases": [], "description": "An AILA focus area concerned with the ethical use of AI.", "grounding_span": "Ethical AI", "location": "AILA section"},
    {"id": "c_ai_governance", "name": "AI governance", "aliases": [], "description": "National frameworks governing AI, which RAM helps countries build and optimize.", "grounding_span": "AI governance", "location": "RAM section"},
    {"id": "c_ai_ecosystem", "name": "AI ecosystem", "aliases": [], "description": "A country's AI capabilities and gaps, of which AILA provides a snapshot.", "grounding_span": "AI ecosystem", "location": "AILA section"},
    {"id": "c_multistakeholder", "name": "Multistakeholder collaborative process", "aliases": [], "description": "A structured research and analytical process engaging national and global actors under UNESCO's guidance.", "grounding_span": "multistakeholder \ncollaborative process", "location": "RAM section"},
    {"id": "c_legal", "name": "Legal dimension", "aliases": ["Legal"], "description": "One of RAM's five readiness dimensions.", "grounding_span": "Legal", "location": "RAM section"},
    {"id": "c_social", "name": "Social/Cultural dimension", "aliases": ["Social/Cultural"], "description": "One of RAM's five readiness dimensions.", "grounding_span": "Social/Cultural", "location": "RAM section"},
    {"id": "c_scientific", "name": "Scientific/Educational dimension", "aliases": ["Scientific/Educational"], "description": "One of RAM's five readiness dimensions.", "grounding_span": "Scientific/Educational", "location": "RAM section"},
    {"id": "c_economic", "name": "Economic dimension", "aliases": ["Economic"], "description": "One of RAM's five readiness dimensions.", "grounding_span": "Economic", "location": "RAM section"},
    {"id": "c_technical", "name": "Technical and Infrastructural dimension", "aliases": ["Technical and Infrastructural"], "description": "One of RAM's five readiness dimensions.", "grounding_span": "Technical and Infrastructural", "location": "RAM section"},
    {"id": "c_human_capital", "name": "Human capital", "aliases": [], "description": "National human capacity that RAM follow-up action seeks to strengthen.", "grounding_span": "strengthen \nhuman capital", "location": "RAM section"},
    {"id": "c_ethical_governance", "name": "Ethical governance", "aliases": [], "description": "Governance that ensures AI is deployed ethically, complementing technical readiness.", "grounding_span": "ensures ethical governance", "location": "closing section"},
    {"id": "c_technical_readiness", "name": "Technical readiness", "aliases": [], "description": "The technical preparedness dimension emphasized alongside ethical governance.", "grounding_span": "technical readiness", "location": "closing section"},
    {"id": "c_ethical_dev", "name": "Ethical AI development", "aliases": [], "description": "The commitment to developing AI ethically that the partnership reinforces globally.", "grounding_span": "ethical AI development", "location": "closing section"},
    {"id": "c_ai_deployment", "name": "AI deployment", "aliases": [], "description": "The rollout of AI, whose risks must be managed and which should be beneficial and equitable.", "grounding_span": "AI deployments are beneficial and equitable", "location": "intro paragraphs"}
  ],
  "definitions": [
    {"id": "d_aila", "term": "Artificial Intelligence Landscape Assessment (AILA)", "verbatim_text": "The UNDP Artificial Intelligence \nLandscape Assessment (AILA) is a \nstrategic tool to evaluate a country’s \nreadiness to integrate AI technologies \nwithin governmental frameworks.", "normative_status": "policy", "as_of_date": null, "grounding_span": "The UNDP Artificial Intelligence \nLandscape Assessment (AILA) is a \nstrategic tool to evaluate a country’s \nreadiness to integrate AI technologies \nwithin governmental frameworks.", "location": "AILA section"},
    {"id": "d_ram", "term": "Readiness Assessment Methodology (RAM)", "verbatim_text": "the \nUNESCO’s Readiness Assessment \nMethodology (RAM) is a comprehensive \ndiagnostic tool directly linked with the \nglobal standard: the Recommendation \non the Ethics of Artificial Intelligence, \nadopted by 193 Member States.", "normative_status": "policy", "as_of_date": null, "grounding_span": "UNESCO’s Readiness Assessment \nMethodology (RAM) is a comprehensive \ndiagnostic tool directly linked with the \nglobal standard: the Recommendation \non the Ethics of Artificial Intelligence, \nadopted by 193 Member States.", "location": "RAM section"}
  ],
  "claims": [
    {"id": "cl_170", "claim_text": "With a presence on the ground in over 170 countries, UNDP country offices, supported by UNDP’s Chief Digital Office, convene stakeholders to assess the current AI landscape through surveys and key informant interviews.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "With a presence on the ground in \nover 170 countries, UNDP country \noffices, supported by UNDP’s Chief \nDigital Office, convene stakeholders \nto assess the current AI landscape \nthrough surveys and key informant \ninterviews.", "location": "AILA section"},
    {"id": "cl_aila_snapshot", "claim_text": "The AILA provides a snapshot of the capabilities and the gaps within a country’s AI ecosystem.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "The AILA provides a \nsnapshot of the capabilities and the \ngaps within a country’s AI ecosystem", "location": "AILA section"},
    {"id": "cl_193", "claim_text": "The Recommendation on the Ethics of Artificial Intelligence was adopted by 193 Member States.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "adopted by 193 Member States", "location": "RAM section"},
    {"id": "cl_ram_diagnostics", "claim_text": "The RAM provides comprehensive diagnostics and policy guidance to countries on how to build and optimize AI governance frameworks.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "the RAM provides comprehensive \ndiagnostics and policy guidance to \ncountries on how to build and optimize \nAI governance frameworks", "location": "RAM section"},
    {"id": "cl_ram_alignment", "claim_text": "RAM helps ensure the alignment of national policies and practices with the global instrument by assessing readiness across five different dimensions.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "RAM \nhelps ensure the alignment of national \npolicies and practices with the global \ninstrument by assessing readiness \nacross five different dimensions", "location": "RAM section"},
    {"id": "cl_complementary", "claim_text": "The complementary potential of the UNDP AILA and UNESCO RAM offers countries a holistic approach to AI readiness and ethical integration.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "The complementary potential of the UNDP AILA and \nUNESCO RAM offers countries a holistic approach to \nAI readiness and ethical integration.", "location": "closing section"}
  ],
  "instruments": [
    {"id": "i_aila", "name": "Artificial Intelligence Landscape Assessment (AILA)", "owner": "UNDP", "year": null, "method": "surveys and key informant interviews, with validation and visioning workshops", "grounding_span": "The UNDP Artificial Intelligence \nLandscape Assessment (AILA)", "location": "AILA section"},
    {"id": "i_ram", "name": "Readiness Assessment Methodology (RAM)", "owner": "UNESCO", "year": null, "method": "multistakeholder collaborative structured research and analytical process", "grounding_span": "UNESCO’s Readiness Assessment \nMethodology (RAM)", "location": "RAM section"}
